pastEvents.title: Training on Gridded Meteorological Data for Weather & Climate
pastEvents.organizer: Department of Geography, Kinnaird College for Women
pastEvents.summary: Talk and training on obtaining and processing gridded meteorological data for weather and climate applications.

pastEvents.title: International Workshop on Vegetation Dynamics of the Himalaya South Slope
pastEvents.summary: Workshop on recent vegetation dynamics and prediction under climate change scenarios.
pastEvents.details: Organized an international workshop on vegetation dynamic assessment of the Himalaya south slope in recent two decades and its prediction under different climate change scenarios (Jan 2024).

pastEvents.summary: Delivered talks and training on forest resources mapping using Earth observation, smart sensing, and cloud computing.

pastEvents.title: Session Chair at RSGCC-2023

pastEvents.title: 3-Day Training on Hyperspectral Data Analysis

pastEvents.title: 5-Day Workshop on RS and GIS for Natural Resource Management

pastEvents.title: Workshop for CKNP Officials on GIS and Remote Sensing

highlights: GIS and remote sensing use in management

pastEvents.title: National Workshop on Land Cover Classification Harmonization
pastEvents.summary: Organized national workshop on harmonization of land cover classification and district-wise forest cover assessment.
pastEvents.details: Organized National Workshop on Development and Harmonization of Land Cover Classification and District-wise Forest Cover Assessment of Pakistan (31 May to 4 June 2010).

upcomingEvents.title: SCD Open Lab Day: Demo of Climate Monitoring Pipelines
upcomingEvents.summary: Come see live demos of sensor-to-dashboard monitoring pipelines and ask questions.
upcomingEvents.details: The Open Lab Day will feature guided demonstrations of SCD monitoring pipelines, including data ingestion from sensor networks, automated quality checks, and dashboard-ready analytics. Visitors can interact with the team, understand dataset organization practices, and get guidance on potential collaboration topics.

upcomingEvents.title: Biodiversity Mapping Using Multi-Temporal Imagery
upcomingEvents.summary: A practical training on mapping biodiversity indicators using multi-temporal satellite data.
upcomingEvents.details: This training session is designed for researchers and students who want to apply multi-temporal imagery workflows. We will cover preprocessing, change detection concepts, and indicator extraction. The session concludes with practical tips for structuring reproducible experiments.

upcomingEvents.title: SCD Research Roundtable: Water Security and Decision Support
upcomingEvents.summary: Discussion roundtable to align research outputs with water security decision needs.
upcomingEvents.details: The roundtable will connect researchers working on hydrology, remote sensing, and decision-support systems. We will discuss how to translate evidence into decision-ready outputs and how to design evaluation methods that match stakeholder requirements.
